summary: Iteration 16 - Tested reCAPTCHA on registration, trending analytics endpoint, subscription checkout/upgrade, payment success callback. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/register accepts recaptcha_token field (reCAPTCHA verification works)
POST /api/auth/register works without recaptcha_token (optional field)
POST /api/auth/login - admin login successful
GET /api/subscriptions/plans - returns free/rise/pro plans with correct prices
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (rise) - creates Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (free) - returns direct downgrade without checkout_url
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (invalid) - returns 400
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout - returns 401 without auth
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade?plan=rise - updates user plan
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade (invalid) - returns 400
POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade - returns 401 without auth
GET /api/analytics/trending - returns trending releases (empty if no distributed releases)
GET /api/analytics/trending - returns 401 without auth
GET /api/analytics/overview - returns analytics data
GET /api/analytics/overview - returns 401 without auth
GET /api/beats - returns beats (public, no auth required)
GET /api/beats?limit=4 - returns limited beats for featured section
Frontend: Register page shows reCAPTCHA widget (Google reCAPTCHA v2 in dark theme)
Frontend: Register page has purple gradient background
Frontend: Login page has purple gradient background
Frontend: Landing page shows Featured Beats section with 4 beats
Frontend: Featured Beats play buttons have data-testid attributes
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats, chart, recent releases
Frontend: Dashboard trending section shows when user has distributed releases
Frontend: Pricing page shows 3 plans (Free, Rise, Pro)
Frontend: Pricing page shows 'Current plan: RISE' badge for logged-in user
Frontend: Pricing page shows YOUR CURRENT PLAN badge on current plan
Frontend: Pricing page shows UPGRADE/DOWNGRADE buttons correctly
Frontend: Pricing page handles ?subscription=success query param (payment callback)
Frontend: Back button visible on non-home pages (pricing, instrumentals)
critical_code_review_comments: reCAPTCHA integration correctly implemented with react-google-recaptcha in dark theme
Backend verifies reCAPTCHA token via Google API, allows registration if service is down
Trending endpoint returns empty array if user has no distributed releases (expected behavior)
Payment success callback in PricingPage.jsx correctly processes ?subscription=success&plan={plan} query params
Subscription checkout creates Stripe checkout for paid plans, instant downgrade for free plan
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo beats and admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested reCAPTCHA on registration (Google reCAPTCHA v2 with site key in REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY), trending analytics endpoint (returns empty if no distributed releases), subscription checkout with Stripe, payment success callback handling. Admin user is on 'rise' plan. reCAPTCHA widget renders in dark theme. Featured Beats section shows 4 beats from /api/beats. 6 demo beats in catalog.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key)
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) - creates real checkout URLs
mocked_apis.reCAPTCHA: Uses real Google reCAPTCHA v2 keys (site key and secret key in env vars)

recaptcha_registration.backend_verification: POST /api/auth/register verifies token via Google API
recaptcha_registration.graceful_degradation: Allows registration if reCAPTCHA service is down

trending_analytics.note: Returns empty array if user has no distributed releases
